items.myth: Anthropic's mission means Claude never refuses user requests.
items.reality: Safety mission explicitly includes refusing or redirecting harmful, abusive, or policy-violating uses—even when users disagree with the boundary.
items.example: Requests for malware instructions may be declined despite the user's intent to "just learn."

items.myth: Being a public-benefit corporation makes Anthropic a nonprofit.
items.reality: A PBC is still a for-profit entity that raises investment and sells products; the charter adds benefit obligations, not tax-exempt status.
items.example: Anthropic sells API access and paid chat plans while citing public benefit duties.
